name: inconnu-xd-v3
description: INCONNU XD V3, a Multi Device WhatsApp Bot by INCONNU BOY

SESSION_ID.description: Your bot SESSION_ID. Get one from the pairing session page.

MODE.description: Worktype of your bot. Use 'public' (everyone can use it) or 'private' (only bot number).

TIME_ZONE.description: Your timezone e.g. America/Sao_Paulo, Africa/Nairobi, America/New_York

LANGUAGE.description: Bot language. Use 'en' for English or 'fr' for French.

AUTO_LIKE_STATUS.description: Auto-like WhatsApp statuses. Set true or false.

AUTO_READ_STATUS.description: Auto-view WhatsApp statuses. Set true or false.

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection URL. Leave blank to use auto-provisioned Heroku Postgres, or supply your own (Neon, Supabase, etc.). Falls back to SQLite if empty.
